GeneDef.label: Short-lived
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene experience the effects of aging earlier in life, averaging their lifespan to approximately 60 years.

GeneDef.label: Ephemeral Lifespan
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have a very short lifespan, passing through life in a relatively brief period. Usually won't exceed much further beyond 40 years.

GeneDef.label: Long-Lived
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene live a long lifespan, maintaining steady health and presence over many years. Their time spans around a century, providing ample opportunity to experience a variety of life stages.

GeneDef.label: Remarkable Lifespan
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene enjoy an extended lifespan, surpassing the typical human span. Their existence continues for a long time, often lasting well beyond the usual duration of most lives.

GeneDef.label: Immense Lifespan
GeneDef.description: Carriers of this gene have an exceptionally long lifespan, stretching far beyond typical boundaries. Though not infinite, their time seems to stretch indefinitely, enduring across generations.
